preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Yours alone — follows your account across campaigns and devices.
preferences.textSizeComfortableDescription: More breathing room and a bounded prose line length.
preferences.textSizeLargeDescription: Larger reading text with more line and paragraph spacing.
preferences.readingPreviewText: A steady lantern makes old field notes easier to follow. Reading settings change prose without enlarging controls, maps, or game tokens.
preferences.themeNote: Accent and reading settings restyle your view only — everyone at the table keeps their own preference.
preferences.languageNote: System uses your browser's regional date and number formats. The display language falls back to English when a translation isn't available.
preferences.mcpBlurb: Point Claude (or any MCP client) at this server to read and write your campaigns — 36+ tools covering quests, NPCs, characters, encounters, dice and more.
preferences.mcpThenConnect: then connect from the tokens page
preferences.deleteBlurb: Permanently deletes your account and its sessions and tokens. Character sheets you own stay in their campaigns (un-owned); notes you wrote stay too. This cannot be undone.
